hero_sub: Thousands of verified vacancies from crewing agencies across Europe. Build your CV, track applications, set your readiness date — all in one harbour.
jobs_none: No vacancies yet. Check back soon.
orig_note: The vacancy description is shown in its original language (provided by the agency).
dash_complete_profile: Complete your profile to increase visibility to recruiters.
dash_alert_active: Active — notifying you of new {rank} positions
dash_alert_get_notified: Get notified when new {rank} vacancies are posted
dash_alert_set_rank: Set your rank in {link} to enable job alerts
dash_suggestions_subtitle: Have a question or suggestion? Write to us — we read everything.
fc_hero_sub: SeaJobs.pro connects crewing companies with thousands of verified seafarers worldwide. Start posting vacancies today at zero cost.
fc_benefits_title: Everything you need to hire at sea
fc_benefits_sub: Built specifically for maritime crewing — not a generic job board.
fc_b1_d: Access thousands of verified seafarers filtered by rank, nationality, and vessel type.
fc_b2_d: Seafarers with matching job alerts are notified the moment you post a new vacancy.
fc_b3_d: Get the blue verified badge — increases application rates significantly.
fc_b4_d: Manage all incoming applications in one dashboard. Mark as viewed, accepted, or rejected.
fc_b5_d: Every vacancy is indexed by Google for Jobs automatically — free extra traffic.
fc_b6_d: Simple form, no bureaucracy. Post a vacancy faster than sending an email.
fc_how_sub: From sign-up to first application in under 10 minutes.
fc_s1_d: Register as a company, fill in your profile and get verified.
fc_s2_d: Fill in rank, vessel type, salary and joining date. Takes 2 minutes.
fc_s3_d: Seafarers apply directly. You review CVs and respond in your dashboard.
fc_contact_sub: Leave your contacts — we'll reach out within 24 hours and help you get set up.
about_hero_sub: SeaJobs.pro is a modern maritime career platform connecting seafarers with verified crewing agencies across Europe and beyond.
about_mission_p1: Maritime careers are built on trust, expertise, and the right connections. SeaJobs.pro was created to be the definitive digital harbour where experienced seafarers can find their next voyage and crewing companies can discover the talent they need.
about_mission_p2: We believe that finding maritime work should be transparent, efficient, and dignified. That's why we provide a platform where your CV, certificates, and experience speak for themselves — no middlemen, no hidden fees.
about_v1_text: We understand the maritime world because we come from it. Every feature is designed around the real needs of seafarers and crewing agencies.
about_v2_text: We verify crewing companies to ensure seafarers only see legitimate, professional job offers from reputable agencies across Europe.
about_v3_text: From the Baltic to the Mediterranean, our platform connects maritime talent with opportunities across all major shipping routes and registries.
about_cta_sub: Use our contact form on the home page or reach out directly.
home_seo_p1: SeaJobs.pro is a free maritime job board built exclusively for seafarers and crewing companies. Whether you are a Captain, Chief Engineer, Deck Officer or any other maritime professional, you will find thousands of verified vacancies from certified crewing agencies across Europe. Create your CV, upload certificates, set your readiness date and receive alerts when matching vacancies appear.
home_seo_p2: Crewing companies post vacancies for free and instantly reach over 32,000 registered seafarers. Every vacancy is automatically structured for Google for Jobs — maximising your reach with zero extra effort or cost. Join 180+ crewing companies that already trust SeaJobs.pro for their maritime recruitment.
footer_tagline: The harbour for maritime careers. Connecting seafarers with crewing agencies worldwide.
co_subtitle: Manage your vacancies and company profile.
co_no_vacancies: You haven't posted any vacancies yet. Post your first job to start finding crew.
co_suggestions_subtitle: Have a question or suggestion? Write to us — we read everything.
cf_sent_sub: We'll get back to you soon.
cf_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
cf_failed: Failed to send. Please try again.
sp_autofill_desc: Upload your CV as a PDF and we'll read your details, certificates and sea experience, then fill them in automatically.
sp_photo_hint: JPG, PNG or WEBP · max 5 MB
sp_competencies_ph: One per line — e.g. Cargo operations & lashing; SMS / ISM / MARPOL; Port State Control
sp_photo_too_large: File is too large. Max 5 MB.
sp_photo_ok: Photo uploaded! Save your profile to apply.
sp_cv_pdf_only: Please upload your CV as a PDF or Word (.doc/.docx) file.
sp_cv_too_large: CV is too large. Max 4 MB.
sp_cv_unreadable: Could not read this CV. Try a clearer PDF or fill the form manually.
sp_cv_missing_key: CV parsing is not configured on the server (missing API key).
sp_cv_imported: CV imported — fields filled. Review the details below and click Save Profile.
sp_cv_failed: CV import failed. Please try again.
ref_desc: Share your link. When a friend you invite joins and completes their profile, you get a 14-day visibility boost in company searches (30 days on your 3rd and 5th referral).
ref_share_msg: I'm using SeaJobs.pro to find maritime jobs — join with my link and we both get a boost:
cref_desc: Share your link. When a seafarer you invite joins and completes their profile, your latest vacancy gets a 14-day featured boost on the jobs board.
cref_share_msg: Check out SeaJobs.pro for maritime jobs — join with my link:
cert_empty: No certificates yet. Add your first certificate above.
exp_empty: No sea experience logged yet. Add your first entry above.
sav_empty_sub: Browse jobs and bookmark positions you like.
app_empty_sub: Browse jobs and apply to get started.
cp_logo_hint: JPG, PNG or WEBP · max 5 MB
cp_about_ph: Brief description of your company, fleet, and what you offer…
cp_file_too_large: File is too large. Max 5 MB.
cp_uploaded: Logo uploaded! Save your profile to apply.
va_job_title_ph: e.g. Chief Engineer for LNG Tanker
va_desc_ph: Describe the position, required certificates, experience, etc.
va_empty: No vacancies yet. Post your first job above.
kb_move_hint: move candidates from New to On board.
kb_empty_sub: Applications from seafarers will appear here once you post vacancies.
va_location_hint: Helps your vacancy appear correctly in Google for Jobs.
cp_crew_hint: Add the people seafarers should contact. You can list several and group them by department.
